title: claytonia media
intro: Claytonia media, also known as miner's lettuce, is a type of annual or biennial plant that belongs to the purslane family. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Claytonia media include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. Claytonia media can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule, and is often used as a natural remedy for various ailments, including digestive issues and skin conditions.
